title: Infected piercings - NHS
text:
ming for the first 24 hours after a piercing
Things to ask your piercer 
If you're thinking about getting a piercing, ask the piercer:
to explain what they're going to do whether there are any risks how to care for your piercing how long it will take to heal

Next review due: 18 April 2026
